description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray chassis and a large rectangular screen. The screen displays a pixel art image of a yellow creature with red cheeks on a black background, reminiscent of retro video game graphics. The keyboard features a standard layout with black keys and a large touchpad below, all set into a flat, matte-finished surface. The laptop's hinge is sturdy, allowing the screen to remain upright at an angle. The exterior surfaces are smooth and hard, with no visible branding or stickers. No ports or additional features are visible on the sides or back of the device.
description: A slim, metallic gray laptop with a pixel art image on its screen and a standard black keyboard. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open laptop with the screen displaying a pixel art image and the keyboard visible.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the closed back of the laptop's screen, with no visible features or ports.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the open laptop with the screen and keyboard visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard, touchpad, and the screen with the pixel art image clearly visible.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a pixel art image on a black background.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad visible.
